reviews.review_msg: He genuinely cares about his students and puts in the effort to make sure his students succeed to the best of their abilities. His class is tough but worth it. The content was extremely interesting and the discussions were insightful and helpful. I recommend doing the non-graded work in order to receive higher grades on exams.

Guillaume is extremely caring, it's clear he wants his students to succeed. His class is interesting and he is a very captivating professor. There are many occasions where he gives constructive feedback to prepare for exams. He is one of the kindest professors I've ever had and couldn't recommend his class more.

Guillaume is a passionate professor and really cares about his students. The quizzes every week are based on the reading of the week and are quite simple. The evaluations have really good feedback and he is highly approachable. I highly recommend Guillaume!
An amazing prof! Would totally recommend- gives great feedback and is caring
Really nice guy who is willing to help correct and go over your papers before handing them in. There's a lot of homework, but it is supposed to help you with your POL classes.
He was a great teacher and helps you a lot when you ask him questions.
Didn't feel comfortable in the class, he's an alright teacher just doesn't make the lecture as interesting as it could be.
